SEARCH
Package com.nib.commons.io

Interface ISysOut

All Known Implementing Classes:
ConsoleSysio, ConsoleSysout, JobSysout, Slf4jSysout
public interface ISysOut
Represents a system output handler interface for writing messages to SYSOUT. Implementations of this interface provide methods for initializing the output, writing plain or formatted messages, and closing the output handler.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    close()
    Closes the system output handler and releases any resources associated with it.
    void
    display(Object... args)
    Displays the provided arguments by writing them to the system output.
    void
    init(String dd)
    Initializes the system output handler.
    void
    printf(String format, Object... args)
    Formats and writes a formatted string to the system output using the specified format string and arguments.

  • Method Details

    • init

      void init(String dd)
      Initializes the system output handler.
      Parameters:
      dd - the initialization parameter required to configure the SYSOUT handler

    • display

      void display(Object... args)
      Displays the provided arguments by writing them to the system output.
      Parameters:
      args - a variable number of objects to be displayed in the system output

    • printf

      void printf(String format, Object... args)
      Formats and writes a formatted string to the system output using the specified format string and arguments.
      Parameters:
      format - the format string following the same rules as used in Formatter
      args - the arguments referenced by the format specifiers in the format string; if there are more arguments than format specifiers, the extra arguments are ignored

    • close

      void close()
      Closes the system output handler and releases any resources associated with it. This method should be called when output operations are complete to ensure proper cleanup and resource management.
